title: Section 37
content: On the application of any of the parties and after notice to the parties, and after hearing such of them as he may desire to be heard, or on his own motion without such notice, the 1[Chairman] may transfer any case pending before one Bench, for disposal, to any other Bench.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 28 of 2016, s. 232, for "Chairperson" (w.e.f. 1-6-2016).
